name: v0.2 robustness: noisy scoring (small perturbations, clamped)
description: Stress test for scoring noise: small perturbations in R/H/O should not cause catastrophic oscillation. Designed to exercise conservative failure modes and decay back toward baseline when noise subsides.

notes: This vector intentionally introduces minor, alternating perturbations (noise) across components.
No component hits 3. Repair entry, if any, should be driven by sum trend (incTwoCycles), not any-hit-3.
Qualitative expectation: occasional safe pauses are acceptable; prolonged max escalation from mild noise would be suspicious.
Use for TS↔Python parity on action/escalation/choreography progression.
